description: Create a 'Grouped product' in WooCommerce named 'Tech Essentials Bundle' in the Electronics category. Link 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' as grouped products. Set the short description to 'Everything you need for a productive remote work setup.' and the main description to 'Our curated Tech Essentials Bundle brings together the must-have gadgets for anyone working from home or on the go.' Publish the product.
